name: AI-HPS simulated hospital navigation map
disclaimer: This is a simulated hospital map created for demonstration because the official hospital map was not available.

landmarks.name: Main Entrance Door
landmarks.description: Patient entry point beside Dermatology.

landmarks.name: Dermatology
landmarks.description: Building directly beside the main entrance.

landmarks.name: Valley Walkway
landmarks.description: Sloped walkway leading from the entrance area to the main gate junction.

landmarks.name: Main Gate Junction
landmarks.description: Central junction where the campus splits left and right.

landmarks.name: Reception / Information Desk
landmarks.description: Central point for general information.

landmarks.name: Laboratory
landmarks.description: Diagnostic laboratory near the central corridor.

landmarks.name: Pharmacy
landmarks.description: Medication dispensing point near reception.

landmarks.name: Cashier / Billing
landmarks.description: Payment point near administration.

landmarks.name: Administration
landmarks.description: Administrative offices.

landmarks.name: Pediatrics
landmarks.description: Left-side building for children services.

landmarks.name: Gynecology and Obstetrics
landmarks.description: Left-side service for gynecology, obstetrics, consultations, childbirth care, and hospitalization.

landmarks.name: Maternity
landmarks.description: Left-side maternity block near Gynecology and Obstetrics.

landmarks.name: Emergency Department
landmarks.description: Urgent care access on the right wing.

landmarks.name: Consultations
landmarks.description: Right-side consultation block.

landmarks.name: Surgery
landmarks.description: Right-side surgical service.

landmarks.name: Operating Block
landmarks.description: Mock location for the surgical operating block. Service runs 24/24 in the provided hospital text.

landmarks.name: ICU / Reanimation
landmarks.description: Critical care unit near the operating block and surgery.

landmarks.name: Hemodialysis
landmarks.description: Right-side hemodialysis unit.

landmarks.name: Blood Bank
landmarks.description: Mock blood bank location near the right clinical corridor.

landmarks.name: Radiology / Imaging
landmarks.description: Imaging unit between laboratory and surgery.

corridors.instruction: Move forward from the main entrance and keep Dermatology on your right.
Continue down the sloped valley walkway.
Follow the walkway until you reach the main gate junction.
Go straight from the main gate junction to Reception.
Turn right from Reception and pass the Laboratory corridor.
Turn left from Reception toward Pharmacy.
Continue upward from Pharmacy to Cashier / Billing.
Walk right from Cashier to the Administration block.
At the main gate junction, take the left-side path toward Pediatrics.
Continue along the left wing from Pediatrics to Gynecology and Obstetrics.
Continue further on the left wing to reach Maternity.
At the main gate junction, take the right-side path toward Emergency.
Pass Emergency and continue to the Consultations block.
From Consultations, continue upward toward Surgery.
From Surgery, follow the short corridor to the Operating Block.
From Surgery, turn right to ICU / Reanimation.
From Surgery, continue upward-left to Hemodialysis.
From Hemodialysis, turn left to the Blood Bank.
From Consultations, take the inner corridor toward Radiology / Imaging.
From Radiology, continue left to the Laboratory corridor.
From Radiology, go upward to the Blood Bank.

query_examples: I am at the main entrance and I want to go to the blood bank.
Where is the bloodbank from the entrance door?
Direct me from the main gate to maternity.
I am at Dermatology. How can I reach Gynecology?
How do I go from Reception to the Operating Block?
I am near Laboratory and I need Hemodialysis.
Guide me from Emergency to ICU.
I want to go to Pediatrics from the front door.
How can I reach the Consultation block from the main entrance?
Je suis a l'entree principale, je veux aller a la maternite.
Ou se trouve le bloc operatoire depuis l'accueil?
Je suis au laboratoire. Comment aller a la banque de sang?
Guide-moi vers la gynecologie depuis la porte principale.
Depuis les urgences, comment atteindre la reanimation?
